contracts.howItWorksTitle: How does the contract generator work?
contracts.howItWorksIntro: Lyra can generate contracts in two ways:
contracts.howItWorksOptionADesc: Upload an existing PDF. Lyra analyzes it, detects empty fields, and guides you to fill them in one by one.
contracts.howItWorksOptionBDesc: Without a base contract, Lyra will ask for the contract type and country, and collect all legally required data before drafting it.
contracts.howItWorksDownloadPre: Once Lyra has collected all the information, it will generate the contract automatically. At that point, a
contracts.howItWorksDownloadPost: will appear in the message to get the PDF ready to sign.

infoModal.title: Defense Preparation
infoModal.desc1: This chat allows you to prepare judicial defense strategies with AI assistance. You can:
infoModal.item1: Structure defense lines and legal arguments
infoModal.item2: Identify weak points and prepare counter-arguments
infoModal.item3: Ask the AI to save the developed strategy
infoModal.item4: Export the defense as PDF to a client's file
infoModal.item5: Attach PDF documents for AI analysis
infoModal.tip: 💡 Tip: When the strategy is complete, ask the AI to save it and you can export it with the Export to client button.

beta.title: Tax Advisory (Beta)
beta.description: You are using an early access feature that is active and operational, with continuous improvements. Although we aim for maximum stability, errors, interruptions, or inaccurate results may occur during its evolution. Use this feature as support and always verify the result before making tax or legal decisions. In the next update, this functionality will be fully implemented to ensure optimal performance in all countries. Lyrium does not guarantee the complete absence of errors in this version and assumes no responsibility for decisions made exclusively based on this beta functionality.

landing.heroSubtitle: Lyrium centralises contracts, clients, defence preparation and document analysis — all assisted by artificial intelligence.
landing.problemH2a: Time is your most valuable asset.
landing.problemDesc: Lawyers spend more than 40% of their working day on tasks that generate no fees. Lyrium gives that time back to you.
landing.problem1: Hours lost searching for documents across folders and emails
landing.problem2: Contracts drafted from scratch for every case
landing.problem3: Client information scattered without order or context
landing.problem4: Communications mixed between email, WhatsApp and calls
landing.solution1: AI that knows every case file and responds instantly
landing.solution2: Contracts generated in seconds using your base templates
landing.solution3: All client information centralised in one place
landing.solution4: Email and WhatsApp integrated in a single automated panel
landing.roiDesc: A lawyer billing at 150 €/hour recoups the monthly investment with just 2 extra hours of productive work. Lyrium gives you back more than 12 hours a week. Do the maths.
landing.mod1Desc: Create and store custom base contracts. Use AI to draft new contracts tailored to each case using your saved templates as a reference.
landing.mod2Desc: Manage your client base with dedicated case files. Start AI conversations contextualised with each client's information and documents.
landing.mod3Desc: Prepare trial strategies with a specialised AI assistant. Structure arguments, detect contradictions and export the strategy to the client's case file.
landing.mod4Desc: Upload documents and get AI-generated summaries automatically. Ask about file contents and receive precise answers instantly.
landing.mod5Desc: Manage email and WhatsApp from a single panel. Automate client communications, receive notifications and keep all correspondence organised.
landing.mod6Desc: Create accounts for each team member. Assign clients per subaccount, manage billing and keep information segmented and organised.
landing.appH2b: not to learn how to use it
landing.appDesc: A clear and direct interface. No learning curve. Up and running in minutes.
landing.ctaDesc: Join the firms already working with Lyrium to be more efficient and competitive.
landing.securityDesc: We comply with the strictest regulations to guarantee the security and privacy of your firm's information.
landing.secSSLDesc: All communications are encrypted end-to-end with 256-bit SSL certificates.
landing.secRGPDDesc: Full compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (EU 2016/679).
landing.secAESDesc: Data at rest encrypted with military-grade AES-256 standard.
landing.secISODesc: Infrastructure designed following international information security standards.
landing.cookieDesc: This site uses essential cookies and browser storage. We also use Google Analytics to improve our service. You can accept all or use essential cookies only.
landing.cookieCatEssentialDesc: Required for basic functionality. Always active.
landing.cookieCatAnalyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use the app.
landing.cookieCatMarketingDesc: Allow us to show you personalised ads.
landing.integSignDesc: Send documents for signing directly from the platform. The client receives an email with a link, signs from any device, and the signed PDF is automatically saved to their case file.
landing.integCalDesc: Connect Google Calendar to view and manage upcoming meetings and deadlines directly from the dashboard without switching between apps.
landing.integZapierDesc: Connect your firm to 5,000+ apps via webhooks and API keys. Automate notifications for new clients, contracts, signatures, invoices, and more with Zapier, Make, or your own tools.
landing.integAIDesc: Upload case law, strategies, or past cases as PDFs and the AI will use them to give you more accurate, tailored responses for your firm.
landing.integShareDesc: Send documents between the main account and your firm’s subaccounts. All team members can access shared files instantly.
landing.billedInEur: Prices shown for reference. Billing is in euros (EUR).

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.intro: Tax Compliance lets you track your tax obligations (Income Tax, VAT, Corporate Tax, etc.) from calculation to payment.
howItWorks.step1: Go to Tax Advisory → Calculations and run a tax calculation for a client (enter income, expenses, VAT, etc.).
howItWorks.step2: Come back here and click "New obligation" — select the saved calculation, choose the tax model and period.
howItWorks.step3: The system will calculate the deadline automatically based on the selected country and model.
howItWorks.then1: Update each obligation's status: calculated → filed → paid.
howItWorks.then2: Check upcoming deadlines in the Calendar tab.
howItWorks.then3: Set up email alerts from Tax Advisory so you never miss a filing date.
howItWorks.then4: Use the AI chat in Tax Advisory to clarify which tax models apply to each client.
